name: Italian Salad Pizza
recipeIngredient: (12 inches), thawed, if frozen or 4 flour tortillas, toasted (see below)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Core the tomatoes and slice them into 1/4-inch-thick slices (makes about 3 cups); set aside.
3. Sprinkle Mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses evenly over the pizza shell; top with tomato slices, slightly overlapping.
4. Bake until the cheese melts, about 8 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine romaine, watercress, roasted peppers, and olives; sprinkle with Italian dressing; toss to coat.
6. Remove the pizza from the oven; top with the romaine and watercress mixture.
7. Cut into wedges and serve immediately. Makes 4 portions.
Note: To toast tortillas, place them on baking sheets in a 450-degree oven until light gold, about 4 minutes.
